pet.name: Biscuit
pet.breedColor: Jack Russell gone soft and silver at the muzzle

memories.quirks: the way you sigh like a person when you lie down
memories.stillLoves: still waits at the window every afternoon at four
memories.favoriteActivity: the slow morning walk we still take, just shorter now
memories.favoriteRitual: the cup of coffee I drink with my hand on your back
memories.sleepingSpot: the warm square of sun by the back door
memories.favoriteSpots: the back step at four o'clock, where the light is
memories.ownerMessage: Thank you for every ordinary afternoon.
